chapters.text: Christa Jesua um hinna thutep dungjuiya Pathen lung got tah a kipansah Christa Jesu solchah Paul’in,
kacha ngaitah Timothy heng’ah; Pa Pathen le i-Pakaiyu Christa Jesua konin lungset, hepi chule lungmon nachung’ah um hen.
Kapute kapatea kona se le pha hetna thenga kahou Pathen chu thangvahjia katao lai chan a nangma geldoh jinga um kahi;
namit lhi lon chu kageldoh jingin, kipana kadim theina dinga nangma mu noma asun a jan a tao jing jeng kahi.
Tahsan kijentah nanga aum chu kageldoh jinge, masanga napi Lois lung sunga chenga chu nang lung sunga jong achen kaging chai.
Hijeh a chu keima khut ngap vanga Pathen thilpeh nanga uma chu nakonsah jing theina dinga kahin geldoh sah kit nahi.
Ajeh chu Pathenin eiho kichatsetna lhagao eipepouve, thil bolthei thahat le ngailut, chule lungthim themna lhagaobou eipeh-u ahi.
Hijeh chun i-Pakaiyu thu hettohsah thulam dol le asohchang keima chung chang thudola jong jahcha hih hel’in; ahin Pathen thilbol thei thahat dungjuiyin Kipana Thupha jal’a thoh hahsa hi neithoh pin;

amatah chun eihuhhingu ahi, chule kouna thenga eikouvu ahi; eiho natoh dungjuiya ahipoi, ama lung got le amilungset dungjuiya bou ahi; hiche lungsetna chu tonsot tonsot masang peh a Christa Jesua eiho einapehsau ahi;
ahin tua vang eihuhhinga Christa Jesu hung kilah a kona kilangdoh ahitai, aman thina asu beiyin Kipana Thupha a hinna le thilouna chu vah a ahinpoh ahi;
hiche Kipana Thupha lama chu keima lhangsam le solchah chule houhil’a panga kahi.

Hijeh a chu hesoh genthei hichengpi hi kathoh ahi; ahinla kajahchapoi; ajeh chu katahsan chu keiman kahei; chule avop dinga akhut’a kapehdoh chengse chu chuche nikhoa dinga chu vop pha a hongbit thei ahi, ti katahsan kichene.
Keima a kona najah thupha kicheh ho vettoh a jui ding dol chengse chu Christa Jesua um ginchatna le ngailutna chun tuh jingin.
Nangma kipea thilpha chu eihoa chenga Lhagao Theng chun hongphan.
Phygelus le Hermogenes te ho Asia gama um chengsen einung ngat soh tauve, hichu nangin nahenai.
Onesiphorus insung mite chu Pakaiyin hepi hen; ajeh chu aman kalung asuhal mat chet jing jin ahi; chule kabulput jong ajachatpi poi;
ahin Rome khoa ahungin jong gunchutah-in eihol’in eihung holdoh jengin ahi.
Pakaiyin ama chu hiche phattheina hi pe hen, hiche nikho ni chule Pakai koma hepina chang hen; chule Ephesus khoa alhacha natoh nasatje chu nangman nahenai.
Chuti ahijeh chun kacha, nangma Christa Jesua uma lungsetna a chun thilbol theina thahat neiyin umin.
Chule ahetoh tamtah ang sunga keima a kona najah chengse chu ginchat um miho chu pedoh-in, amaho jong chun midang ho ahil thei dingu ahi.
Nangman Christa Jesu sepai phatah bangin ahahsa kathoh gim hi neithoh pin.
Sepai galsat pet koima tu hinkhoa khankho ding gelnan akisunoh jipoi, pha sa a sepaiya apansahpa lung lhaisah ding bou alung ahi.
Chule golseh kitetna jenga jong khattouvin gol jo na dingin kihabol nama jeng jong le, dan ngaitah a abol loule, lallukhuh akhuhji poi.
Loubol mi natong gima chu agam ga chang masapen dingdol ahi.
Kasei hi ipi ahi geltoh-in; ajeh chu Pakaiyin imalam jousea lungthim napeh ding ahi.
Kathuhil Kipana Thupha dungjuiya, athi lah a kona thoudoh kit David chilhah Jesu Christa chu geldoh jing jengin;
hiche Kipana Thupha jeh a chu keiman akhang gilou banga bulput geiya hesoh genthei kathoh ahi; ahivangin Pathen thu chu akihen tang dehpoi.
Hijeh a chu keiman lhenchom ho dinga, amaho Christa Jesua um huhhingna chu achan theiyuva tonsot loupina chutoh anei theina dinguva hichengpi hi kathoh gim ahi.
Hiche kasei hi ginchat umtah ahi, athina a ithiu le ahinna a jong ihin dingu;
athoh chu ithoh piu le ava, ipoh jong ipohpi dingu ahi; eihon ama seilep leu hen, aman jong eiseilep dingu ahi;
eiho ginchatna bei ihiule ama chu ginchat umtah hijing ahi; ajeh chu ama kiseilep thei lou ahi.
Nangman thu hicheng hi geldohsah jingin; phatchomna bei moh thu pouva akinel baotam louna dingun, Pakai mitmua hilchah jin; aja ho dinga mansuhna ahibouve.
Nangma kipatep them chang banga Pathena kipehna dingin gunchun pon panin, jachatna beihel natong mi hin, thutah thu chu jangkei chan mang chan.
Amavang Pathen ja louna hou seisetna moh thu mai maiya konin kihei mangin; ajeh chu chutobang deiho chu Pathen ngaisahmona lama chal tou cheh cheh ding ahiuve.
Chule athu u jong chun masemon nehkem banga aneh dingu ahi; alah uva lha a chu Hymenaeus le Philetus ahilhone.
Amaho chu thutah lampia kona petmanga lam haiya ahiuvin, thokitna chu kichaisa ahitai, atiuvin, mi kimkhat ginchatna aleheitauve.
Ahinla Pathen khombul phudettah chu ading jingnai; achunga hiche thu hi kinama ahi, koi koi ama a ahi Pakaiyin ahenai; chule koi hile Pakai min pan a chu chonphat louna konin kikhin mang hen, ti hi,
Amavang inpi sunga khun sana le dangka bel jeng uma ahipoi, thing le leibei jong aumin, hiche ho chu abang sahlut dol aumin, abang sahlut lou dol aume.
Hichenga kona kithensodoh chu ama chu sahlut dol tah ahi, akisutheng ahin, Pakai natonga lomtah ahin, chule thilpha bolna lam jousea dinga kigosa ahi.
Nangma vang gol-lhan lai lungtup lung ngaiya konin jamin; chule chonphatna tahsan, ngailut, lungmon, chule lung thengsel’a Pakai henga tao ho toh pum khat hi na hicheng chu hadel’in.
Ahin ngolkai le lungthim beiho kinelna a lhah ding nom hih hel’in; hichea kon chun kinahna asoh jin ahi, nahei.
Pakai soh chun doubol adol ahipoi; chusanga chu mi jouse dinga nun nema, mihil thema, lungde hat ding,
chule lung nema adouho chu apuijang dingjoh ahibouve; chutia chu Pathenin ijemtia thutah hetna lama lungheina apeh khat le; ama lung got lama lungheina apeh khat le;
ama lung got lama diabol’in gal-hinga amatnau thangkol’a kon chun kiteldoh thei khat’unte.
Amavang hiche hi heuvin, ninu nung lam le phat hahsa khoh tah hung lhung ding ahi.
Hiche teng chule mi ama changmai kingailua, sum ngailut, nom-ham, huset le hoitho, taitomhat, nu thu pa thu ngailou, phatpa ngaisah lou,
lungsetna neilou, kihou champi mohel, hehset hat, ti kitim lou, kichat um, phatna hoa,
tahsan pailha, kichamsah, kiletsah, chule Pathen ngailut sanga nopsah ngailut johna,
Pathen ngaisah lhema athahat athilbol thei janom lou, hicheng chu hung um ding ahi; hichenga kon jong chun kihei mangin.
Amaho lah a kimkhat duha lungthimin mi in’a alut jiuvin, chonset pohgih poa, lung ngaichat tamtah puilonle,
chule akihiljing vanga thutahgil hetheilou numei lungthimbei ho chu alhemlhauvin gal hingin amanjiuvin ahi.
Chule Jannes le Jambres chun Mose adoudal lhon bang banga chu hite ho jong hin thutah chu adoudal’u ahi; lungput sesa, tahsan lam thua Pathen deimo mi ahiuve.
Ahivangin amaho chu gamlatah mason lou ding ahiuve; khat teni banga chu amaho jong angolnau chu mi jouse jah a kisei phongle ding ahi.
Nangma vang kathuhil kanun, kakhan, kalung, tahsan, thoh hat, ngailut, lung dehat, bolsetna tintang le hesoh genthei kathoh nung juiya nahitai;
Antioch khoa, Iconium-a, chule Lystra kho chengsea kachunga itobang thu soh tam, bolsetna ijat kathoh hitam, ahin Pakaiyin chuti ho jousea kon chun eihuhdoh tai.
Chule koi hile Pathen ngaisah kijentah a Christa Jesua hinga um lung go chan chun bolsetna athoh ding ahi.
Ahin migilou ho chule milhem lha ho vang chu setna lama khangtou cheh cheh ding ahiuve; amaho duha kilhem lha ahiuvin, duha alhep lhah dingu ahi.
Ahin nangma vang nakihilsa chengse le naphotchetsa chengsea chun dingdet jingin; koi koiya kona kihil’a nahi nangman nahenai.
Chule huhhinga umna dinga nachihsah thei Pathen lekhabu theng chu nachapan laiya pat’a nahin hetsa peh ahitai.
Pathenin ahaikhum Pathen lekhabua thu kisun chengse chu kihilna a, kipho na a, kipuijangna a, chonphat kisinsahna dinga phatah ahi;
chutia chu Pathen mi chu pha chamkim keiya, thilpha bolna lama chamkim keiya kigosadema aum theina dingin,
Keiman Pathen mitmua le ahing le athi ho thutan dinga Christa Jesu mitmua ama hung kilahna le agam chu pan a guntah a kahilchah nahi;
thu chu hil lhang len; aphat le aphat louva jong pang jing jengin; lung nengin hiltoh tlton lang, athemmonau hetsah-in lang, sosaljin chule tilkhoujin.
Ajeh chu hitobang phat hi hung lhung ding ahi, mihon thuhilpha kicheh chu angai thei lou ding, akol’u thah tun tuna ama ama lung ngaichat dungjuiya, mihil akikhop khom dingu ahi;
chule thutah a kona anau ahei manguva, moh thusim lama lamvai dingu ahi.
Ahin nangma vang ima lam jousea limgeh chan um jingin; thoh hahsa thohin, Evangelist na chu tongin; nalhacha natoh chu bulhit molson.
Ajeh chu tua hi keima eikipedohsa ahitai, kapotdoh phat hung lhunga ahitai.
Golseh phatah chu kaseh joutai, kilhaitet na kachaitai, tahsan chu kamolsotai.

Tua kipat hi keima dinga chonphatna lal lukhuh chu koisa ahitai; chondih a thutan Pakai chun hiche nikho ni chule eipeh ding ahi; keima chang jeng goh hilouva ama hung kilah ngailu chengse jong chu apeh ding ahi.
Kaheng lama hungvahna dingin hung kihabol’in;
Demas tulai vannoi leiset angailut jeh-in, keima eidalhan Thessalonica achetai; Crescens Galatia lama achen, chule Titus Dalmatia lama achei;
Luke changseh keima toh kaume. Mark hin puiyin lang hung lhonin; ama chu lhacha natohna a kadinga phachomtah ahi.
Tychicus vang Ephesus lama kasoltai.
Troas khopia Carpus khut’a kasangkhol len kadalhah chule lekhabu ho, ahideh chu savun lekhabuho chu, nahung teng le hinpon.
Alexander sumsan kheng chu kachunga akhang gilou lheh jenge; athilbol dungjuiyin Pakaiyin lethuh nante.
Nangjong ama lama chun hung kihongphan; ama chun ithu u hi hadouvin adou dal’in ahi.
Keiman kakihonna thu kasei masahpen chun, koimacha keima eipanpia abeihel’in ahi; eidalha soh keiyun ahi, hichu amaho them mon kisim hih hen.
Achuti vangin keima vanga thu chu hil lhanga aum soh keiya chidang namdang ho jousen ahet theina dingun Pakai chun eidinpin eihatsah tai; hichun keipi kam sunga kon chun kasoh chatan ahi.
Pakai chun gitlou bol jousea konin eihuhdoh intin, avan gama dingin eihuhhing nante; min let loupi chu tonsot tonsot geiyin a ma a hi jing hen. Amen.
Prisca le Aquila chule Onesiphorus insung mite chu salamin.
Erastus Corinth a aumdentai; Trophimus vang anat jeh-in Miletus a kadalhatai.
Nangma phalbi kah-a hung dingin hung kihabol’in. Eubulus te ho, Pudens te ho, Linus te ho, Claudia te ho, sopite jousen nasalamui.
Pakaiyin nalhagao umpi hen. Nachunga lungsetna um hen.
